requirement_topic.en: Residual Current / Shock Protection — DC Fault Current Detection
requirement_topic.zh: 剩余电流 / 触电保护 — 直流故障电流检测
requirement_topic.zht: 剩餘電流 / 觸電保護 — 直流故障電流檢測

summary.en: EU legal duties for EVSE shock protection arise from applicable product safety legislation (such as LVD where in scope) and national installation rules. IEC 61851-1, HD 60364-7-722 and IEC/EN 62955 are technical standards commonly used to show appropriate DC residual-current protection, including Type B RCD or integrated RDC-DD approaches. These standards are not the legal obligation by themselves; they provide technical routes for demonstrating product and installation safety.
summary.zh: 欧盟关于EVSE触电保护的法律义务来自适用产品安全法规（如适用范围内的LVD）及各国安装规则。IEC 61851-1、HD 60364-7-722和IEC/EN 62955是常用于证明直流剩余电流保护适当性的技术标准，包括B型RCD或集成RDC-DD方案。这些标准本身并非法律义务；它们提供证明产品和安装安全的技术路径。
summary.zht: 歐盟關於EVSE觸電保護的法律義務來自適用產品安全法規（如適用範圍內的LVD）及各國安裝規則。IEC 61851-1、HD 60364-7-722和IEC/EN 62955是常用於證明直流剩餘電流保護適當性的技術標準，包括B型RCD或集成RDC-DD方案。這些標準本身並非法律義務；它們提供證明產品和安裝安全的技術路徑。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements)
IEC/EN 62955:2018 (Residual direct current detecting device — RDC-DD)

HD 60364-7-722:2018 (Low-voltage electrical installations — Requirements for special installations — Supplies for electric vehicles) (confirmed: HD 60364-7-722:2018 approved by CENELEC 27 August 2018; supersedes HD 60364-7-722:2016)

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements) includes leakage current protection requirements for EV charging. However, Chinese market products commonly ship with Type A RCDs (AC residual current only, per GB 6829 / IEC 61008 series), which cannot detect the smooth DC residual currents produced by switched-mode on-board chargers. GB/T 18487.1 does not explicitly mandate Type B RCD or RDC-DD equivalent performance as a default requirement for all EVSE modes. (GB/T 18487.1-2023 effective 1 April 2024 supersedes the 2015 edition; confirm the specific RCD-type clause against the published standard text — EU-equivalent Type B RCD mandates are not confirmed as incorporated.)
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统 第1部分：通用要求）包含电动汽车充电设备的漏电保护要求。然而，中国市场产品通常配备仅能检测交流剩余电流的A型RCD（参照GB 6829 / IEC 61008系列），无法检测开关式车载充电机产生的平滑直流剩余电流。GB/T 18487.1并未对所有充电模式的充电设备明确强制要求B型RCD或等效RDC-DD性能。（GB/T 18487.1-2023已于2024年4月1日起实施，取代2015年版；须对照标准发布文本核实具体RCD类型条款——尚未确认已纳入与欧盟等效的B型RCD强制要求。）
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統 第1部分：通用要求）包含電動汽車充電設備的漏電保護要求。然而，中國市場產品通常配備僅能偵測交流剩餘電流的A型RCD（參照GB 6829 / IEC 61008系列），無法偵測開關式車載充電機產生的平滑直流剩餘電流。GB/T 18487.1並未對所有充電模式的充電設備明確強制要求B型RCD或等效RDC-DD性能。（GB/T 18487.1-2023已於2024年4月1日起實施，取代2015年版；須對照標準發布文本核實具體RCD類型條款——尚未確認已納入與歐盟等效的B型RCD強制要求。）

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements)
GB 6829 (Residual current operated protective devices — general rules, Chinese national standard)
IEC 61008 series (Residual current operated circuit-breakers — Type A, referenced in CN practice)

gap.en: EU product-safety and installation frameworks expect DC fault-current protection suitable for EV charging, commonly demonstrated through Type B RCD or integrated RDC-DD evidence under IEC/EN 62955 and related installation practice. Chinese EV chargers commonly ship with Type A RCDs only, which are blind to smooth DC residual currents. Exporting a Chinese unit to the EU without demonstrating equivalent DC fault-current protection is a safety-compliance blocker and typically requires hardware redesign or specification of an external certified Type B RCD in the installation. Gap scope depends on product mode and whether the unit already incorporates a protection circuit certified to IEC/EN 62955 or equivalent evidence.
gap.zh: 欧盟产品安全及安装框架期望电动汽车充电具备适当的直流故障电流保护，通常可通过符合IEC/EN 62955及相关安装实践的B型RCD或集成RDC-DD证据来证明。中国电动汽车充电器通常仅配备A型RCD，对平滑直流剩余电流无感知。未证明等效直流故障电流保护即出口至欧盟，属于安全合规阻断项，通常需要硬件重新设计，或在安装端规定使用经认证的外置B型RCD。差距范围取决于产品充电模式及是否已集成经IEC/EN 62955认证或具备等效证据的保护电路。
gap.zht: 歐盟產品安全及安裝框架期望電動汽車充電具備適當的直流故障電流保護，通常可通過符合IEC/EN 62955及相關安裝實務的B型RCD或集成RDC-DD證據來證明。中國電動汽車充電器通常僅配備A型RCD，對平滑直流剩餘電流無感知。未證明等效直流故障電流保護即出口至歐盟，屬於安全合規阻斷項，通常需要硬件重新設計，或在安裝端規定使用經認證的外置B型RCD。差距範圍取決於產品充電模式及是否已集成經IEC/EN 62955認證或具備等效證據的保護電路。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: applicable EU product safety law and national electrical installation rules require adequate shock and residual-current protection. IEC 61851-1, HD 60364-7-722 and IEC/EN 62955 are voluntary/nationally adopted technical standards used to demonstrate that protection; they are not standalone EU legal mandates.
mandatory_status.cn: Not explicitly mandatory for export products under GB/T 18487.1; Type A RCD is common practice in CN domestic market

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: HIGH RISK — Chinese EV chargers shipping with Type A RCD only may fail EU product-safety or installation acceptance for Mode 2/3 EVSE unless equivalent DC fault-current protection is demonstrated. Upgrading to a Type B RCD or adding a certified RDC-DD (IEC/EN 62955 route) is a common technical solution, but the mandatory duty is compliance with applicable law and installation rules, not the IEC/EN standard itself. This is informational only; confirm against current published standards and obtain qualified legal/certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 高风险 — 仅配备A型RCD的中国电动汽车充电器，如不能证明等效直流故障电流保护，可能无法通过欧盟模式二/三充电设备的产品安全或安装验收。升级为B型RCD或加装经认证的RDC-DD（IEC/EN 62955路径）是常见技术方案，但强制性义务是符合适用法律和安装规则，而非IEC/EN标准本身。本内容仅供参考，请对照现行标准并咨询专业法律/认证顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: 高風險 — 僅配備A型RCD的中國電動汽車充電器，如不能證明等效直流故障電流保護，可能無法通過歐盟模式二/三充電設備的產品安全或安裝驗收。升級為B型RCD或加裝經認證的RDC-DD（IEC/EN 62955路徑）是常見技術方案，但強制性義務是符合適用法律和安裝規則，而非IEC/EN標準本身。本內容僅供參考，請對照現行標準並諮詢專業法律/認證顧問。

requirement_topic.en: Residual Current Protection — Installation Requirements under Low-Voltage Electrical Installation Standard
requirement_topic.zh: 剩余电流保护 — 低压电气装置标准安装要求
requirement_topic.zht: 剩餘電流保護 — 低壓電氣裝置標準安裝要求

summary.en: Beyond the EVSE product itself, EU member-state low-voltage installation rules govern the fixed wiring installation of EV charging points. HD 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722 are technical installation standards commonly adopted or referenced nationally for EV charging circuits, including DC fault-current detection through Type B RCD or equivalent RDC-DD approaches unless the EVSE unit already incorporates such protection. The installer and local inspection/DSO framework, not only the manufacturer, determine correct RCD selection in the fixed installation.
summary.zh: 除充电设备本身外，欧盟成员国低压安装规则还规范电动汽车充电点的固定线路安装。HD 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722是各国通常采纳或引用的电动汽车充电回路技术安装标准，包括在充电设备本身未内置此类保护时，通过B型RCD或等效RDC-DD实现直流故障电流检测。固定安装中正确选用RCD由安装方及当地检查/配电运营商框架共同决定，而非仅由制造商决定。
summary.zht: 除充電設備本身外，歐盟成員國低壓安裝規則還規範電動汽車充電點的固定線路安裝。HD 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722是各國通常採納或引用的電動汽車充電迴路技術安裝標準，包括在充電設備本身未內置此類保護時，通過B型RCD或等效RDC-DD實現直流故障電流檢測。固定安裝中正確選用RCD由安裝方及當地檢查/配電運營商框架共同決定，而非僅由製造商決定。

standards_or_laws: HD 60364-7-722:2018 (CENELEC harmonization document — Low-voltage electrical installations, Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supplies for electric vehicles) (confirmed: HD 60364-7-722:2018 approved by CENELEC 27 August 2018)
IEC 60364-7-722 (IEC base standard implemented via HD 60364-7-722 in EU member states)
IEC/EN 62955:2018 (Residual direct current detecting device — RDC-DD)

summary.en: In China, GB 50054 (Low voltage power distribution design code) and GB/T 18487.1 govern EV charging installation design. These standards require leakage protection but do not mandate Type B RCD or RDC-DD for all EV charging circuits. Local installation practice commonly uses Type A RCDs or ELCBs (earth leakage circuit breakers) rated per GB 6829, which lack DC residual current sensitivity. (As of June 2026, no confirmed 2023–2025 amendment to GB 50054 introducing Type B RCD requirements for EV charging circuits has been identified; confirm with SAC before relying on this for compliance decisions.)
summary.zh: 在中国，电动汽车充电装置安装设计由GB 50054（低压配电设计规范）及GB/T 18487.1规范。这些标准要求配置漏电保护，但未对所有电动汽车充电回路强制要求B型RCD或RDC-DD。国内安装实践通常使用按GB 6829规格选用的A型RCD或漏电断路器（ELCB），缺乏直流剩余电流检测能力。（截至2026年6月，未确认GB 50054或相关标准2023-2025年修订版引入了电动汽车充电回路B型RCD要求；在作出合规决策前请向SAC确认。）
summary.zht: 在中國，電動汽車充電裝置安裝設計由GB 50054（低壓配電設計規範）及GB/T 18487.1規範。這些標準要求配置漏電保護，但未對所有電動汽車充電回路強制要求B型RCD或RDC-DD。國內安裝實踐通常使用按GB 6829規格選用的A型RCD或漏電斷路器（ELCB），缺乏直流剩餘電流偵測能力。（截至2026年6月，未確認GB 50054或相關標準2023-2025年修訂版引入了電動汽車充電回路B型RCD要求；在作出合規決策前請向SAC確認。）

standards_or_laws: GB 50054-2011 (Low voltage power distribution design code — China)
GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements)
GB 6829 (Residual current operated protective devices — Chinese national standard, Type A equivalent)

gap.en: EU installation rules commonly expect the fixed wiring circuit feeding each EV charging point to have Type B RCD or RDC-DD protection unless the EVSE unit already provides equivalent internal protection. Chinese installation standards do not carry the same EU installation expectation. A Chinese manufacturer selling hardware to EU installers should either integrate compliant protection internally so the installer can use the allowed upstream RCD arrangement, or clearly specify the required external protection in installation documentation; otherwise the installed system may be rejected even if the product has its own test evidence.
gap.zh: 欧盟安装规则通常期望为每个电动汽车充电点供电的固定线路回路配备B型RCD或RDC-DD保护，除非充电设备本身已内置等效保护。中国安装标准不包含同样的欧盟安装预期。向欧盟安装商销售硬件的中国制造商应在设备内部集成合规保护，使安装商可采用允许的上游RCD配置，或在安装文档中明确所需外置保护；否则即使产品本身具备测试证据，整套安装系统仍可能被拒绝。
gap.zht: 歐盟安裝規則通常期望為每個電動汽車充電點供電的固定線路迴路配備B型RCD或RDC-DD保護，除非充電設備本身已內置等效保護。中國安裝標準不包含同樣的歐盟安裝預期。向歐盟安裝商銷售硬件的中國製造商應在設備內部集成合規保護，使安裝商可採用允許的上游RCD配置，或在安裝文檔中明確所需外置保護；否則即使產品本身具備測試證據，整套安裝系統仍可能被拒絕。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: EU member-state electrical installation law, inspection rules and DSO requirements require compliant fixed EV charging installations. HD 60364-7-722 / IEC 60364-7-722 and IEC/EN 62955 are voluntary or nationally adopted technical standards used to demonstrate accepted installation practice; they are not standalone EU legal mandates.
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — GB 50054 and GB/T 18487.1 do not mandate Type B RCD or RDC-DD for EV charging circuit installations under Chinese rules

source.publisher: European Commission — Harmonised standards for Low Voltage Directive

compliance_verdict.en: HIGH RISK — Chinese EV chargers exported to the EU should address both product-level safety evidence and installation-level DC fault protection expectations. Failure to address the installation-level RCD gap can mean the product is documented but the complete installed system is rejected. Manufacturers should specify Type B RCD or RDC-DD requirements explicitly in EU installation manuals. This is informational only; obtain qualified certification and legal advice before making compliance decisions.
compliance_verdict.zh: 高风险 — 出口至欧盟的中国电动汽车充电器应同时处理产品级安全证据和安装级直流故障保护预期。若未解决安装端RCD差距，即使产品文件完备，整套安装系统仍可能被拒绝。制造商应在欧盟安装说明书中明确注明B型RCD或RDC-DD要求。本内容仅供参考，正式合规决策前请咨询专业认证及法律顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: 高風險 — 出口至歐盟的中國電動汽車充電器應同時處理產品級安全證據和安裝級直流故障保護預期。若未解決安裝端RCD差距，即使產品文件完備，整套安裝系統仍可能被拒絕。製造商應在歐盟安裝說明書中明確注明B型RCD或RDC-DD要求。本內容僅供參考，正式合規決策前請諮詢專業認證及法律顧問。
